[ESTABLISHED] The issue occurred because the entire `~/.gemini` folder was mapped into the Git-tracked `dots/gemini` path of the NixOS configuration. As a result, sensitive session data, local logs, and generated OAuth tokens/credentials were added to the Git index.

To resolve this:

1. **Updated `.gitignore`**:
   The `.gitignore` file has been updated to explicitly ignore sensitive, dynamic, and temporary directories/files inside `dots/gemini/`:
   ```gitignore

   dots/gemini/antigravity/
   dots/gemini/antigravity-cli/
   dots/gemini/antigravity-ide/
   dots/gemini/history/

   dots/gemini/oauth_creds.json
   ```
